# v1.1.3 release notes

Stability and verification release after the dashboard modularization split.

## What's new

- Fixed `Open Project Terminal` so selecting a task opens a visible terminal window again.
- Improved live dashboard background/window behavior by removing the forced fullscreen window-manager state and reducing dependence on `xdotool`.
- Changed the footer resource label to show free storage in gigabytes.
- Added a module-aware dashboard integrity check so the launcher, extracted dashboard modules, and smoke QA are verified together.

## Updating from v1.1.x

Use Update OS as usual after this tagged release is published.

## Verify download

```sh
sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS
```

You want to see `OK` next to the ISO name.
